items.blinded_text: This market will resolve according to the number of views the next Entity B video posted by Entity A gets in the first 24 hours after being posted. This market may not resolve until the 24 hours are complete, regardless of whether a strike is reached earlier. If Entity A does not post a Entity B video by relative-date-1 , specified-time ET, this market will resolve to the lowest range bracket. If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket. The resolution source for this market is Entity A's Entity B channel (https://www.Entity B.com/@Entity A), specifically the 'views' counter for the described video. Note: This market refers to Entity A's next video to be posted. Shorts, previews, or other videos released other than the referenced video will not be considered.

question: Will Entity A's next video get between 35 and 40 million views on day 1?
